markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review December performance, align on content, and plan for Q1 reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Q1 Reporting:** A quarterly report (Sep–Jan) is due by early Feb for the Feb 17 sales kickoff, showing growth in traffic, LLM visibility, and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [**Content Direction:** The strategy will shift from pure volume to quality, focusing on brand consistency (via infographics) and repurposing high-value assets (webinars).](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [**Performance:** December traffic showed steady growth (vs. Oct), but top-page keyword rankings are flat. Gun detection content is the top performer, validating its focus.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [**New Tooling:** GrowthX's proprietary AI visibility platform will replace Scrunch, providing Ambient with direct access to track B2B-relevant prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

## Topics

### December Performance Review

  - [**Traffic:** Overall traffic dipped from the Nov keynote spike but showed steady growth when benchmarked against October.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Organic Search:**](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Impressions & Keyword Footprint:** Both increased, signaling a growing SEO presence.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [**CTR & Avg. Position:** Declined, a normal dilution effect from indexing a large volume of new content.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Top-Page Rankings:** Everest noted these are flat, not growing.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
          - [**Action:** Bailey will investigate this metric to ensure ranking improvements are on target keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [**Content Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [**Top Performer:** Gun detection content is driving the most traffic, validating its strategic focus.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Underperformer:** Industry-specific content has a high impression-to-click gap.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
          - [**Action:** Bailey will investigate for title/meta optimization or technical SEO issues.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [**Untested:** The "Use Cases" content bucket has not been published.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
          - [**Action:** GrowthX will propose more ideas to enable performance testing.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [Small but high-engagement traffic from AI platforms is being cited in relevant prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [**Problem:** Scrunch dashboards are not providing clear signals due to tracking too many irrelevant prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX will replace Scrunch with its own platform, which focuses on B2B buying categories and will give Ambient direct access.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

### Content Strategy & Execution

  - [**Infographics:** Approved for article generation to improve engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
      - [**Process:** Everest will provide brand assets (colors, icons). GrowthX will use these and calibrate the design.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Brand Messaging:**](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [**Problem:** The AI engine misunderstood "Ambient Intelligence," treating it as a generic technology.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [**Solution:** Atul will finalize the updated messaging doc. Bailey will share GrowthX's internal glossary of Ambient-specific terms to help define them.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [**Velocity:** High cadence continues to catch up from the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [**Status:** 4 articles are ready for review in the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

### Q1 Reporting & Strategic Goals

  - [**Q1 Report:**](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
      - [**Purpose:** For the Feb 17 sales kickoff and E-staff strategy meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Scope:** Covers Sep–Jan, showing progress in traffic, LLM visibility, and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Delivery:** Early February, allowing time for review and edits.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [**Strategic Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
      - [**ICP Awareness:** Track website visits from Global 2000 companies to measure awareness, interest, and decision-making.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
      - [**Competitive Benchmarking:** Compare performance to peers (ZeroEyes, VoltaEyes).](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
      - [**Content Repurposing:** Create a workflow to automate content from high-frequency webinars (3–4 per quarter).](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Atul:** Finalize and share the updated brand messaging document.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [Share GrowthX's internal glossary of Ambient-specific terms.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [Investigate the flat trend in top-page keyword rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
      - [Investigate the impression-to-click gap for industry-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [Propose more content ideas for the "Use Cases" bucket.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Demo the new AI visibility platform at the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [Deliver the Q1 report (Sep–Jan) in early February.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
      - [Research methods for tracking ICP awareness and competitive benchmarks.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [**Everest:** Provide brand assets (colors, icons) for infographic design.](https://fathom.video/share/KVsVyQ4B6ArsaJx5dGT2uuJbwUfEQmn1?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
